title: Migrating telemetry and security agents from dockershim — Yahoo Kubectl Flame
text:
Flame does not support container runtimes other than Docker. See
https://github.com/yahoo/kubectl-flame/issues/51

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement

CNCF website guidelines
for more details.
You should read the
content guide
before proposing a change that adds an extra third-party link.
